children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Beginning on the date that is three years after , and annually thereafter, the Director of the National Institute of Justice shall publish statistics on the number of cold case murders.August 3, 2022

children.heading: Manner of publication
children.label: b Manner of publication
children.text: The statistics published pursuant to subsection (a) shall, at a minimum, be disaggregated by the circumstances of the cold case murder, including the classification of the offense, and by agency.
